title: Chinese Lantern Festival
desc: Dozens of massive handcrafted lanterns celebrating the Year of the Horse + countries in the soccer tournament. Cultural performances, food vendors.

title: Roots Picnic
desc: Jay-Z, Erykah Badu, Kehlani, Brandy, T.I., De La Soul, DJ Jazzy Jeff, Adam Blackstone and more. Philly's signature music festival.

title: RiverRink Summerfest
desc: Rides, roller skating, arcade games, minigolf on the waterfront. Free admission, pay-as-you-go activities. Memorial Day through Labor Day.

title: Odunde Festival
desc: Largest African and African-American street festival in the US. African marketplace, music, dance, food from across the diaspora. Second Sunday in June.

title: Philadelphia Cycling Classic
desc: Major cycling race returns after hiatus. Route hits Kelly Drive, Strawberry Mansion, Lemon Hill, and the legendary Manayunk Wall.

title: Betsy Ross House Flag Fest
desc: 9-day festival with immersive tours, historical re-enactments, Betsy Ross herself. Culminates on Flag Day with unveiling of a never-before-seen artifact.

title: What Now Creative Festival (ArtPhilly)
desc: 10 days of multidisciplinary arts: concerts, theater, dance, visual art, museum experiences from 80+ local artists across iconic Philly venues.

title: Mann Center 50th Anniversary Concert
desc: Philadelphia Orchestra commemorative concert celebrating the Mann Center's 50th anniversary and America's 250th. World premiere with The Crossing choir.

title: Rhythm Nation
desc: Multigenre dance night celebrating House, Afrobeats, Baile Funk, UK Garage, Amapiano. Featuring DJs Kingspy, Sylo & TJ Groover. Don Julio cocktail tasting menu.

title: Stock Market Flea: Magazine Drop
desc: Community event highlighting local creatives with a new magazine release. DJ sets, visuals, and creative atmosphere. Free with RSVP. Hosted by @stockedup2015 with @ni8_ and @itsdjdj.

title: Philadelphia Creators Summit
desc: Lenfest Institute & Google News Initiative summit for news creators. Build audience, learn revenue strategies, and network with creators shaping the future of local storytelling.

title: Hash N' B
desc: Late night vibes at Margolis. 21+ event. Follow @hashland on Instagram for details.

title: Strictly Bashment
desc: Internashional Bounce presents Strictly Bashment. Penn Relay Weekend. Dancehall, reggae, soca, and bashment riddims all night. Sounds by Na$h + DJ Afrik. 21+.

title: Yoga & Networking in Philly
desc: Yoga and networking event bringing together Philly professionals for movement and connection.

title: Club Advisory at Bastet
desc: Club Advisory night at Bastet.

title: Sweet Stanzas Open Mic
desc: Open mic night for poets and performers at Malelani Cafe in Germantown.

title: HuB Karaoke: Throwback Edition
desc: Throwback edition karaoke night at The HuB on Spring Garden.

title: Rhythm Nation
desc: Rhythm Nation dance party at Margos.

title: Lost in Love: An All Love Songs Party
desc: 21+ all love songs party at Blind Barber. No cover before 10pm.

title: B-Sides: Day Party
desc: B-Sides day party at Margos in Fishtown.

title: International Bounce Presents: Ayiti Nights
desc: International Bounce presents Ayiti Nights — a celebration of Haitian music and culture at Broad Hall.

title: Bodies in Space
desc: Bodies in Space — performance/art event.

title: RedBull Dance Your Style Official After Party
desc: Official after party for RedBull Dance Your Style competition.
